```{r volcano_adj_selected_1e4_250, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, dpi=300}
  "dacomp (1e+06)" = "dacomp\n1e+06 permutations",
  "dacomp (1e+07)" = "dacomp\n1e+07 permutations",
  "permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=250)" = "dacomp + permApprox\n1e+04 permutations; k0=250"
)

plot_volcano_long(
  res_all_long,
  panel_methods = c("dacomp", "permApprox"),
  n_perm_dacomp = c(1e6, 1e7),
  n_perm_permApprox = 1e4,
  constraints   = c("slls"),
  exceed0_vals  = c(250),
  p_type        = "adj",
  annotate_taxa = taxa_to_annotate,
  title         = NULL,
  lfc_thresh   = 0,
  box_padding  = 0.4,
  point_padding = 0.3,
  force        = 2,
  panel_label_map = panel_label_map
)
```

##### permApprox with 10,000 permutations and k0=0.25B

```{r volcano_adj_all_sig_1e4_0.25, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, dpi=300}
set.seed(42)

panel_label_map <- c(
  "dacomp (1e+06)" = "dacomp\n1e+06 permutations",
  "dacomp (1e+07)" = "dacomp\n1e+07 permutations",
  "permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=0.25)" = "dacomp + permApprox\n1e+04 permutations; k0=0.25B"
)

plot_volcano_long(
  res_all_long,
  panel_methods = c("dacomp", "permApprox"),
  n_perm_dacomp = c(1e6, 1e7),
  n_perm_permApprox = 1e4,
  constraints   = c("slls"),
  exceed0_vals  = c(0.25),
  p_type        = "adj",
  annotate_taxa = "significant",
  title         = NULL,
  lfc_thresh   = 0,
  box_padding  = 0.4,
  point_padding = 0.3,
  force        = 2,
  panel_label_map = panel_label_map
)
```

```{r volcano_adj_selected_1e4_0.25, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, dpi=300}
taxa_to_annotate <- p_wide_adj %>%
  filter(`permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=0.25)` < 1e-04) %>%
  arrange(`permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=0.25)`) %>%
  slice_head(n = 8) %>%
  pull(taxon)

set.seed(42)

panel_label_map <- c(
  "dacomp (1e+06)" = "dacomp\n1e+06 permutations",
  "dacomp (1e+07)" = "dacomp\n1e+07 permutations",
  "permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=0.25)" = "dacomp + permApprox\n1e+04 permutations; k0=0.25B"
)

plot_volcano_long(
  res_all_long,
  panel_methods = c("dacomp", "permApprox"),
  n_perm_dacomp = c(1e6, 1e7),
  n_perm_permApprox = 1e4,
  constraints   = c("slls"),
  exceed0_vals  = c(0.25),
  p_type        = "adj",
  annotate_taxa = taxa_to_annotate,
  title         = NULL,
  lfc_thresh   = 0,
  box_padding  = 0.4,
  point_padding = 0.3,
  force        = 2,
  panel_label_map = panel_label_map
)
```


#### Four panel plots (raw p-values)

##### permApprox with 1000 permutations

```{r volcano_raw_four_panel_1e3, fig.width=12, fig.height=5.5, dpi=300}
sel_threshold <- 1e-05

top_permApprox <- p_wide_raw %>%
  filter(`permApprox (1e+03, SLLS, exceed0=250)` < sel_threshold) %>%
  arrange(`permApprox (1e+03, SLLS, exceed0=250)`) %>%
  pull(taxon)

top_dacomp1e6 <- p_wide_raw %>%
  filter(`dacomp (1e+06)` < sel_threshold) %>%
  arrange(`dacomp (1e+06)`) %>%
  pull(taxon)

top_dacomp1e7 <- p_wide_raw %>%
  filter(`dacomp (1e+07)` < sel_threshold) %>%
  arrange(`dacomp (1e+07)`) %>%
  pull(taxon)

taxa_to_annotate_1e3 <- union(top_permApprox, union(top_dacomp1e6, top_dacomp1e7))

set.seed(42)

panel_label_map <- c(
  "dacomp (1e+03)" = "dacomp\n1e+03 permutations\nRuntime: 0.03min",
  "dacomp (1e+06)" = "dacomp\n1e+06 permutations\nRuntime: 27.72min",
  "dacomp (1e+07)" = "dacomp\n1e+07 permutations\nRuntime: 283.07min",
  "permApprox (1e+03, SLLS, exceed0=250)" = 
    "dacomp + permApprox\n1e+03 permutations\nRuntime: 0.06min"
)

plot_volcano_long(
  res_all_long,
  panel_methods = c("dacomp", "permApprox"),
  n_perm_dacomp = c(1e3, 1e6, 1e7),
  n_perm_permApprox = 1e3,
  constraints   = c("slls"),
  exceed0_vals  = c(250),
  p_type        = "raw",
  annotate_taxa = taxa_to_annotate_1e3,
  title         = NULL,
  lfc_thresh    = 0,
  box_padding   = 0.4,
  point_padding = 0.3,
  force         = 2,
  panel_label_map = panel_label_map,
  y_breaks      = c(0, 3, 6, 10, 15, 20)
)
```


##### permApprox with 10,000 permutations and k0=250

```{r volcano_raw_four_panel_1e4_250, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, dpi=300}
sel_threshold <- 1e-05

top_permApprox <- p_wide_raw %>%
  filter(`permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=250)` < sel_threshold) %>%
  arrange(`permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=250)`) %>%
  pull(taxon)

top_dacomp1e6 <- p_wide_raw %>%
  filter(`dacomp (1e+06)` < sel_threshold) %>%
  arrange(`dacomp (1e+06)`) %>%
  pull(taxon)

top_dacomp1e7 <- p_wide_raw %>%
  filter(`dacomp (1e+07)` < sel_threshold) %>%
  arrange(`dacomp (1e+07)`) %>%
  pull(taxon)

taxa_to_annotate <- union(top_permApprox, union(top_dacomp1e6, top_dacomp1e7))

set.seed(42)

panel_label_map <- c(
  "dacomp (1e+04)" = "dacomp\n1e+04 permutations\nRuntime: 0.32min",
  "dacomp (1e+06)" = "dacomp\n1e+06 permutations\nRuntime: 27.72min",
  "dacomp (1e+07)" = "dacomp\n1e+07 permutations\nRuntime: 283.07min",
  "permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=250)" = 
    "dacomp + permApprox\n1e+04 permutations\nRuntime: 0.34min"
)

plot_volcano_long(
  res_all_long,
  panel_methods = c("dacomp", "permApprox"),
  n_perm_dacomp = c(1e4, 1e6, 1e7),
  n_perm_permApprox = 1e4,
  constraints   = c("slls"),
  exceed0_vals  = c(250),
  p_type        = "raw",
  annotate_taxa = taxa_to_annotate,
  title         = NULL,
  lfc_thresh    = 0,
  box_padding   = 0.4,
  point_padding = 0.3,
  force         = 2,
  panel_label_map = panel_label_map,
  y_breaks      = c(0, 2, 4, 6, 9, 12, 15, 18)
)
```

##### permApprox with 10,000 permutations and k0=0.25B

```{r volcano_raw_four_panel_1e4_025B, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, dpi=300}
sel_threshold <- 1e-05

top_permApprox <- p_wide_raw %>%
  filter(`permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=0.25)` < sel_threshold) %>%
  arrange(`permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=0.25)`) %>%
  pull(taxon)

top_dacomp1e6 <- p_wide_raw %>%
  filter(`dacomp (1e+06)` < sel_threshold) %>%
  arrange(`dacomp (1e+06)`) %>%
  pull(taxon)

top_dacomp1e7 <- p_wide_raw %>%
  filter(`dacomp (1e+07)` < sel_threshold) %>%
  arrange(`dacomp (1e+07)`) %>%
  pull(taxon)

taxa_to_annotate <- union(top_permApprox, union(top_dacomp1e6, top_dacomp1e7))

set.seed(42)

panel_label_map <- c(
  "dacomp (1e+04)" = "dacomp\n1e+04 permutations\nRuntime: 0.32min",
  "dacomp (1e+06)" = "dacomp\n1e+06 permutations\nRuntime: 27.72min",
  "dacomp (1e+07)" = "dacomp\n1e+07 permutations\nRuntime: 283.07min",
  "permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=0.25)" = 
    "dacomp + permApprox\n1e+04 permutations\nRuntime: 0.43min"
)

plot_volcano_long(
  res_all_long,
  panel_methods = c("dacomp", "permApprox"),
  n_perm_dacomp = c(1e4, 1e6, 1e7),
  n_perm_permApprox = 1e4,
  constraints   = c("slls"),
  exceed0_vals  = c(0.25),
  p_type        = "raw",
  annotate_taxa = taxa_to_annotate,
  title         = NULL,
  lfc_thresh    = 0,
  box_padding   = 0.4,
  point_padding = 0.3,
  force         = 2,
  panel_label_map = panel_label_map,
  y_breaks      = c(0, 2, 4, 6, 9)
)
```

### Boxplots and Histograms

We plot boxplots for the dacomp-rarefied counts and histograms of the permutation distributions.

```{r}
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Helper: Compute the taxa sets from res_all_long
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

sig_sets_from_long <- function(res_all_long,
                               alpha = 0.01,
                               p_type = c("adj", "raw"),
                               dacomp_panels,
                               permApprox_panel) {
  p_type <- match.arg(p_type)
  p_col <- if (p_type == "adj") "p_adj" else "p_raw"

  # keep only the panels we care about for the set definitions
  df <- res_all_long %>%
    dplyr::filter(panel %in% c(dacomp_panels, permApprox_panel)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(sig = !is.na(.data[[p_col]]) & (.data[[p_col]] <= alpha)) %>%
    dplyr::select(taxon, panel, sig) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = panel, values_from = sig, values_fill = FALSE)

  stopifnot(permApprox_panel %in% colnames(df))
  stopifnot(all(dacomp_panels %in% colnames(df)))

  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      sig_permApprox = .data[[permApprox_panel]],
      n_sig_dacomp    = rowSums(dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(dacomp_panels))),
      sig_any_dacomp  = n_sig_dacomp > 0,
      sig_all_dacomp  = n_sig_dacomp == length(dacomp_panels),

      sig_all = sig_permApprox & sig_all_dacomp,
      sig_permApprox_only = sig_permApprox & !sig_any_dacomp,
      sig_dacomp_only     = sig_any_dacomp & !sig_permApprox
    )

  list(
    wide = df,
    sig_all = df %>% dplyr::filter(sig_all) %>% dplyr::pull(taxon),
    sig_permApprox_only = df %>% dplyr::filter(sig_permApprox_only) %>% dplyr::pull(taxon),
    sig_dacomp_only = df %>% dplyr::filter(sig_dacomp_only) %>% dplyr::pull(taxon)
  )
}
```


```{r}
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Plot function for boxplots
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

plot_rarefied_rel_abund <- function(
  taxa,
  res_dacomp,
  y_groups,
  palette_groups,
  res_all_long,
  order_panel = NULL,     # e.g. order_panel
  p_type = c("adj", "raw"),
  top_n = 8,
  eps_abund = 1e-6,
  ncol = 4,
  title = NULL
) {
  p_type <- match.arg(p_type)
  p_col <- if (p_type == "adj") "p_adj" else "p_raw"

  taxa <- unique(as.character(taxa))
  taxa <- taxa[!is.na(taxa) & nzchar(taxa)]

  if (length(taxa) == 0) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() +
             annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0, label = "No taxa to plot", size = 5))
  }

  # dacomp rarefied counts
  dacomp_counts <- res_dacomp$rarefied_counts
  dimnames(dacomp_counts) <- dimnames(X_counts)  # uses your existing X_counts naming

  # keep only taxa present in dacomp_counts
  taxa <- intersect(taxa, colnames(dacomp_counts))
  if (length(taxa) == 0) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() +
             annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0, label = "Taxa not found in rarefied_counts", size = 5))
  }

  # optionally select top_n taxa
  if (!is.null(top_n) && length(taxa) > top_n) {

    if (!is.null(order_panel)) {
      ord_tbl <- res_all_long %>%
        dplyr::filter(panel == order_panel, taxon %in% taxa) %>%
        dplyr::select(taxon, p = .data[[p_col]]) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(p)

      taxa <- ord_tbl$taxon[seq_len(min(top_n, nrow(ord_tbl)))]
    } else {
      taxa <- taxa[seq_len(top_n)]
    }
  }

  # relative abundances from rarefied counts
  rel_abund <- sweep(dacomp_counts[, taxa, drop = FALSE], 1, rowSums(dacomp_counts), FUN = "/")

  sample_groups <- tibble::tibble(
    sample = rownames(dacomp_counts),
    group  = y_groups
  )

  abund_df <- rel_abund %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("sample") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(sample_groups, by = "sample") %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
      cols      = dplyr::all_of(taxa),
      names_to  = "taxon",
      values_to = "rel_abund"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      group = factor(group, levels = c(label1, label2))
    )

  # order facets by p-values in order_panel (if provided)
  if (!is.null(order_panel)) {
    tax_order <- res_all_long %>%
      dplyr::filter(panel == order_panel, taxon %in% taxa) %>%
      dplyr::select(taxon, p = .data[[p_col]]) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(p) %>%
      dplyr::pull(taxon)

    abund_df <- abund_df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(taxon = factor(taxon, levels = tax_order))
  } else {
    abund_df <- abund_df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(taxon = factor(taxon, levels = taxa))
  }

  abund_nonzero <- abund_df %>% dplyr::filter(rel_abund > 0)

  ggplot() +
    geom_jitter(
      data = abund_df,
      aes(x = group, y = rel_abund + eps_abund, color = group),
      width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 1.2
    ) +
    geom_boxplot(
      data = abund_nonzero,
      aes(x = group, y = rel_abund + eps_abund, fill = group),
      outlier.shape = NA,
      alpha = 0.8
    ) +
    scale_y_log10(labels = scales::label_scientific(digits = 1)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = palette_groups) +
    scale_color_manual(values = palette_groups) +
    facet_wrap(~ taxon, scales = "free_y", ncol = ncol) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = NULL,
      y = "dacomp-rarefied counts"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.title   = element_text(size = 14),
      strip.text   = element_text(size = 12)
    )
}

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Plot function for histograms
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

plot_perm_histograms <- function(
  taxa,
  res_dacomp,
  taxa_ids,
  res_all_long = NULL,
  order_panel = NULL,        # e.g. order_panel
  p_type = c("adj", "raw"),  # how to rank taxa if order_panel is used
  top_n = NULL,              # e.g. 8 to mirror your boxplots
  bins = 40,
  ncol = 4,
  title = NULL
) {
  p_type <- match.arg(p_type)
  p_col <- if (p_type == "adj") "p_adj" else "p_raw"

  taxa <- unique(as.character(taxa))
  taxa <- taxa[!is.na(taxa) & nzchar(taxa)]

  if (length(taxa) == 0) {
    return(
      ggplot() +
        theme_void() +
        annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0, label = "No taxa to plot", size = 5)
    )
  }

  # --- pull permutation stats from dacomp ---
  stats_mat  <- res_dacomp$stats_matrix
  obs_stats  <- stats_mat[1, ]
  perm_stats <- stats_mat[-1, , drop = FALSE]

  # align names (important!)
  names(obs_stats)     <- taxa_ids
  colnames(perm_stats) <- taxa_ids

  # keep only taxa that exist in this dacomp run
  taxa <- intersect(taxa, taxa_ids)
  if (length(taxa) == 0) {
    return(
      ggplot() +
        theme_void() +
        annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0, label = "Taxa not found in stats_matrix", size = 5)
    )
  }

  # --- optionally order + take top_n (same idea as your boxplots) ---
  if (!is.null(top_n) && length(taxa) > top_n) {

    if (!is.null(order_panel) && !is.null(res_all_long)) {
      ord_tbl <- res_all_long %>%
        dplyr::filter(panel == order_panel, taxon %in% taxa) %>%
        dplyr::select(taxon, p = .data[[p_col]]) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(p)

      taxa <- ord_tbl$taxon[seq_len(min(top_n, nrow(ord_tbl)))]
    } else {
      taxa <- taxa[seq_len(top_n)]
    }
  } else if (!is.null(order_panel) && !is.null(res_all_long)) {

    tax_order <- res_all_long %>%
      dplyr::filter(panel == order_panel, taxon %in% taxa) %>%
      dplyr::select(taxon, p = .data[[p_col]]) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(p) %>%
      dplyr::pull(taxon)

    # keep only those that were found
    taxa <- intersect(tax_order, taxa)
  }

  # subset permutation matrix
  perm_sub <- perm_stats[, taxa, drop = FALSE]
  obs_sub  <- obs_stats[taxa]

  # long data for ggplot
  perm_long <- as.data.frame(perm_sub) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
      cols      = dplyr::everything(),
      names_to  = "taxon",
      values_to = "stat_perm"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(taxon = factor(taxon, levels = taxa))

  obs_df <- tibble::tibble(
    taxon    = factor(taxa, levels = taxa),
    stat_obs = as.numeric(obs_sub)
  )

  facet_labs <- sprintf("%s\n(dacomp stat = %.2f)", taxa, obs_sub[taxa])
  names(facet_labs) <- taxa

  ggplot(perm_long, aes(x = stat_perm)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = bins, color = "white", alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(
      data = obs_df,
      aes(xintercept = stat_obs),
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.6
    ) +
    facet_wrap(
      ~ taxon,
      scales = "free",
      ncol = ncol,
      labeller = labeller(taxon = facet_labs)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Permutation test statistic",
      y = "Frequency"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text  = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 13)
    )
}

```

#### 1000 permApprox permutations

```{r}
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Choose meaningful settings
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

alpha_sig <- 0.01

dacomp_panels_sig <- c(
  "dacomp (1e+06)",
  "dacomp (1e+07)"
)

order_panel <- "permApprox (1e+03, SLLS, exceed0=250)"  # for sig + ordering

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Pick which dacomp run to use for rarefied counts
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

n_perm_rarefy <- 1e3
res_dacomp_rarefy <- dacomp_res_list[[as.character(n_perm_rarefy)]]
stopifnot(!is.null(res_dacomp_rarefy))

res_dacomp_hist <- dacomp_res_list[[as.character(n_perm_rarefy)]]
stopifnot(!is.null(res_dacomp_hist))

taxa_ids <- colnames(X_counts)

sig_sets <- sig_sets_from_long(
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  alpha = alpha_sig,
  p_type = "adj",
  dacomp_panels = dacomp_panels_sig,
  permApprox_panel = order_panel
)

sig_all             <- sig_sets$sig_all
sig_permApprox_only <- sig_sets$sig_permApprox_only
sig_dacomp_only     <- sig_sets$sig_dacomp_only
```

##### Significant in ALL settings

```{r boxplots_1e3_sig_all, fig.width=12, fig.height=6, dpi=200}
# 1) significant in ALL (permApprox main + all selected dacomp panels)
plot_rarefied_rel_abund(
  taxa = sig_all,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_rarefy,
  y_groups = y_groups,
  palette_groups = palette_groups,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 8,
  ncol = 4
)
```


```{r perm_histograms_1e3_sig_all, fig.width=12, fig.height=6, dpi=200}
plot_perm_histograms(
  taxa = sig_all,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_hist,
  taxa_ids = taxa_ids,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 8,
  ncol = 3
)
```

##### Significant in permApprox only

```{r boxplots_1e3_sig_permApprox, fig.width=4, fig.height=4, dpi=200}
# 2) significant in permApprox main only
plot_rarefied_rel_abund(
  taxa = sig_permApprox_only,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_rarefy,
  y_groups = y_groups,
  palette_groups = palette_groups,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 8,
  ncol = 4
)
```

```{r perm_histograms_1e3_sig_permApprox, fig.width=5, fig.height=3, dpi=200}
plot_perm_histograms(
  taxa = sig_permApprox_only,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_hist,
  taxa_ids = taxa_ids,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 8,
  ncol = 3
)
```


##### Significant in dacomp panels, but not permApprox

```{r boxplots_1e3_sig_dacomp, fig.width=12, fig.height=4, dpi=200}
# 3) significant in any selected dacomp panel but not permApprox main
plot_rarefied_rel_abund(
  taxa = sig_dacomp_only,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_rarefy,
  y_groups = y_groups,
  palette_groups = palette_groups,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 8,
  ncol = 4
)
```

```{r perm_histograms_1e3_sig_dacomp, fig.width=9, fig.height=4, dpi=200}
plot_perm_histograms(
  taxa = sig_dacomp_only,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_hist,
  taxa_ids = taxa_ids,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 8,
  ncol = 2
)
```

##### Taxa from four-panel plot for 1e03 permutations

```{r boxplots_1e3_four_panel_dacomp, fig.width=12, fig.height=6, dpi=200}
# 3) significant in any selected dacomp panel but not permApprox main
plot_rarefied_rel_abund(
  taxa = taxa_to_annotate_1e3,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_rarefy,
  y_groups = y_groups,
  palette_groups = palette_groups,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 9,
  ncol = 3
)
```

```{r perm_histograms_1e3_four_panel_dacomp, fig.width=12, fig.height=6, dpi=200}
plot_perm_histograms(
  taxa = taxa_to_annotate_1e3,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_hist,
  taxa_ids = taxa_ids,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 9,
  ncol = 3
)
```


#### 10000 permApprox permutations

```{r}
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Choose meaningful settings
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

alpha_sig <- 0.01

dacomp_panels_sig <- c(
  "dacomp (1e+06)",
  "dacomp (1e+07)"
)

order_panel <- "permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=0.25)"  # for sig + ordering

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Pick which dacomp run to use for rarefied counts
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

n_perm_rarefy <- 1e4
res_dacomp_rarefy <- dacomp_res_list[[as.character(n_perm_rarefy)]]
stopifnot(!is.null(res_dacomp_rarefy))
```

##### Significant in ALL settings

```{r boxplots_1e4_sig_all, fig.width=12, fig.height=6, dpi=200}
# 1) significant in ALL (permApprox main + all selected dacomp panels)
plot_rarefied_rel_abund(
  taxa = sig_all,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_rarefy,
  y_groups = y_groups,
  palette_groups = palette_groups,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 8,
  ncol = 4
  #title = "Relative abundances (dacomp rarefied) — significant in ALL selected panels"
)
```

```{r perm_histograms_1e4_sig_all, fig.width=12, fig.height=6, dpi=200}
plot_perm_histograms(
  taxa = sig_all,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_hist,
  taxa_ids = taxa_ids,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 8,
  ncol = 3
)
```

##### Significant in permApprox only

```{r boxplots_1e4_sig_permApprox, fig.width=12, fig.height=6, dpi=200}
# 2) significant in permApprox main only
plot_rarefied_rel_abund(
  taxa = sig_permApprox_only,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_rarefy,
  y_groups = y_groups,
  palette_groups = palette_groups,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 8,
  ncol = 4
  #title = "Relative abundances (dacomp rarefied) — permApprox-only hits"
)
```

```{r perm_histograms_1e4_sig_permApprox, fig.width=5, fig.height=3, dpi=200}
plot_perm_histograms(
  taxa = sig_permApprox_only,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_hist,
  taxa_ids = taxa_ids,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 8,
  ncol = 3
)
```

##### Significant in dacomp panels, but not permApprox

```{r boxplots_1e4_sig_dacomp, fig.width=12, fig.height=6, dpi=200}
# 3) significant in any selected dacomp panel but not permApprox main
plot_rarefied_rel_abund(
  taxa = sig_dacomp_only,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_rarefy,
  y_groups = y_groups,
  palette_groups = palette_groups,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 8,
  ncol = 4
  #title = "Relative abundances (dacomp rarefied) — dacomp-only hits"
)
```

```{r perm_histograms_1e4_sig_dacomp, fig.width=9, fig.height=4, dpi=200}
plot_perm_histograms(
  taxa = sig_dacomp_only,
  res_dacomp = res_dacomp_hist,
  taxa_ids = taxa_ids,
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  order_panel = order_panel,
  p_type = "adj",
  top_n = 8,
  ncol = 2
)
```

## Tables

```{r}
n_top <- 20

# Panel used to SORT the taxa (“main” permApprox panel)
panel_rank <- "permApprox (1e+03, SLLS, exceed0=250)"

# Panels to be used as columns in the table
panels_show <- c(
  "dacomp (1e+03)",
  "dacomp (1e+06)",
  "dacomp (1e+07)",
  "permApprox (1e+03, unconstrained, exceed0=250)",
  "permApprox (1e+03, SLLS, exceed0=250)",
  "permApprox (1e+04, unconstrained, exceed0=250)",
  "permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=250)",
  "permApprox (1e+04, SLLS, exceed0=0.25)"
)

stopifnot(panel_rank %in% unique(res_all_long$panel))
stopifnot(all(panels_show %in% unique(res_all_long$panel)))
```

```{r}
# Helpers
sci <- function(x, digits = 2) {
  ifelse(is.na(x), NA_character_, formatC(x, format = "e", digits = digits))
}

build_top_table_from_long <- function(
  res_all_long,
  panel_rank,
  panels_show,
  p_type = c("raw", "adj"),
  n_top = 20,
  exclude_reference = FALSE,
  digits_p = 2
) {
  p_type <- match.arg(p_type)
  p_col  <- if (p_type == "raw") "p_raw" else "p_adj"

  df <- res_all_long %>%
    dplyr::filter(panel %in% union(panel_rank, panels_show)) %>%
    dplyr::select(taxon, log2_fc, is_reference, panel, p = .data[[p_col]])

  if (exclude_reference) {
    df <- df %>% dplyr::filter(!is_reference)
  }

  ## --- determine top taxa by ranking panel -----------------------
  taxa_top <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(panel == panel_rank) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(p) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = n_top) %>%
    dplyr::pull(taxon)

  ## --- wide p-value table ----------------------------------------
  p_wide <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(taxon %in% taxa_top, panel %in% panels_show) %>%
    dplyr::select(taxon, panel, p) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = panel, values_from = p)

  ## --- metadata (one row per taxon) ------------------------------
  meta <- res_all_long %>%
    dplyr::filter(taxon %in% taxa_top) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(taxon, log2_fc, is_reference)

  ## --- combine ---------------------------------------------------
  out <- meta %>%
    dplyr::left_join(p_wide, by = "taxon") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      taxon = factor(taxon, levels = taxa_top)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(taxon) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      taxon   = as.character(taxon),
      log2_fc = if ("log2_fc" %in% names(.)) round(log2_fc, 2) else NULL
    )

  ## --- printable version ----------------------------------------
  out_print <- out %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      dplyr::across(
        dplyr::all_of(panels_show),
        ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), NA_character_,
                 formatC(.x, format = "e", digits = digits_p))
      )
    )

  list(
    data_numeric = out,
    data_print   = out_print
  )
}
```

### Unadjusted p-values table

```{r}
tab_raw <- build_top_table_from_long(
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  panel_rank   = panel_rank,
  panels_show  = panels_show,
  p_type       = "raw",
  n_top        = n_top,
  exclude_reference = FALSE
)

tab_raw$data_print %>%
  dplyr::select(taxon, log2_fc, dplyr::all_of(panels_show)) %>%
  knitr::kable(
    align   = "l",
    caption = paste0(
      "Top ", n_top,
      " genera sorted by ", panel_rank,
      " (unadjusted p-values)."
    )
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

```


```{r}
tab_raw_latex <- tab_raw$data_print %>%
  dplyr::select(Genus = taxon, `log2 FC` = log2_fc, dplyr::all_of(panels_show))

tab_raw_latex_out <- knitr::kable(
  tab_raw_latex,
  format   = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  escape   = TRUE,   # keep panel names literal; set FALSE only if you insert math yourself
  caption  = paste0(
    "Top ", n_top,
    " genera sorted by ", panel_rank,
    " (unadjusted p-values)."
  ),
  label    = "tab:top_effects_raw"
) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped"),
    font_size     = 8
  )

print(tab_raw_latex_out)
kableExtra::save_kable(tab_raw_latex_out, path_target("top_effects_raw_table.tex"))
```

### Adjusted p-values table

```{r}
tab_adj <- build_top_table_from_long(
  res_all_long = res_all_long,
  panel_rank   = panel_rank,
  panels_show  = panels_show,
  p_type       = "adj",
  n_top        = n_top,
  exclude_reference = FALSE
)

tab_adj$data_print %>%
  dplyr::select(taxon, log2_fc, dplyr::all_of(panels_show)) %>%
  knitr::kable(
    align   = "l",
    caption = paste0(
      "Top ", n_top,
      " genera sorted by ", panel_rank,
      " (BH-adjusted p-values)."
    )
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

```

```{r}
tab_adj_latex <- tab_adj$data_print %>%
  dplyr::select(Genus = taxon, `log2 FC` = log2_fc, dplyr::all_of(panels_show))

tab_adj_latex_out <- knitr::kable(
  tab_adj_latex,
  format   = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  escape   = TRUE,
  caption  = paste0(
    "Top ", n_top,
    " genera sorted by ", panel_rank,
    " (BH-adjusted p-values)."
  ),
  label    = "tab:top_effects_adj"
) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped"),
    font_size     = 8
  )

print(tab_adj_latex_out)
kableExtra::save_kable(tab_adj_latex_out, path_target("top_effects_adj_table.tex"))

```
